feature_request: I want to manage my todos. You can save the todos in memory. You don't need to create a database.
last_feedback:
Fresh repair attempt. Use only this feedback plus the handoff context; do not rely on prior tool history. Tests failed: # Test Report Status: failed Command: `python3 -m pytest /tests -q --junitxml=/tests/test-results.xml` Exit code: 1 Counts: 3 tests, 1 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped ## Pytest Output ```text F..     • ' in '\n\n\n\n(.*?)' items = re.findall(pattern, html, re.DOTALL) id_map = {text.strip(): tid for tid, text in items} assert 'Alpha' in id_map and 'Beta' in id_map, 'Could not locate added todos.' alpha_id = id_map['Alpha'] # Criterion 2: Clicking delete removes the item without full page reload. html_after = _post('/delete', {'id': alpha_id}) # Deleted todo gone; remaining stays. assert 'Alpha' not in html_after, 'Deleted todo still visible after deletion.' assert 'Beta' in html_after, 'Remaining todo disappeared after deleting another.' # Criterion 4: Remaining todos shift to fill the gap smoothly. beta_id = id_map['Beta'] assert f'data-id="{beta_id}"' in html_after, 'Remaining todo lost its delete button.' # Criterion 3: Deleted todos cannot be recovered within the same session. html_again = _post('/delete', {'id': alpha_id}) assert 'Todo not found' in html_again, 'Deleted todo was recoverable.'
